about_description: Deck Shelves adds custom game shelves to your Steam Deck Home screen. Create shelves from collections, library sections, or custom filters, and manage them directly from the Quick Access Menu.
about_feature_advanced_groups: Create advanced filter groups with AND/OR and nested rules
about_feature_api: Public plugin API for external integrations
about_feature_atomic_settings: Atomic settings writes with backup to prevent corruption
about_feature_ci_tests: Improved CI and test coverage (Vitest + pytest)
about_feature_compat: Displays Steam Deck compatibility badges on game cards
about_feature_developer_filter: Developer / Publisher filter with automatic batch discovery
about_feature_duplicate: Duplicate shelves to quickly create variations
about_feature_dynamic_sizing: Dynamic card sizing that matches native Steam card dimensions from CSS Loader themes
about_feature_edit_smart: Edit smart shelves: override sort, add extra filters, tweak visuals
about_feature_external_imports: Import library tabs from TabMaster or other provider plugins to convert them into shelves
about_feature_filters: Filter by name, playtime, install status, compatibility, visibility, and more
about_feature_first_run: First-run banner with default shelf templates
about_feature_global_toggles: Global toggles for match native size and highlight first with per-shelf override
about_feature_hero_global: Global hero toggle in the QAM Visual section that enables hero art on every shelf at once
about_feature_hero_per_shelf: Hero background art per shelf — regular or smart — with a toggle in the Edit Shelf modal's Visual tab
about_feature_hide_recents: Hide native Recent Games section with optional hero background art
about_feature_highlight_first: Highlight first game as a landscape featured card
about_feature_import_export: Import and export shelf configurations as JSON files
about_feature_manual_base_sort: Manual sort: pick the base order (playtime, release date…) for games you haven't placed
about_feature_mouse_hover: Mouse hover support: labels and brightness activate on hover
about_feature_new_filters: New filter options: playtime ranges, regex name matching, store tags, achievements
about_feature_new_sorts: Additional sort options: playtime, release date, size, review scores
about_feature_online_cloud_play: Cloud-play sub-toggle for online shelves (global + per-shelf) — keep cloud-only catalogue entries (e.g. Xbox Cloud Gaming via Unifideck) visible on wishlist / store-on-sale shelves
about_feature_online_shelves: Online shelves: surface your Steam wishlist and active store deals as live shelves on Home
about_feature_playtime: Shows total playtime on focused game cards
about_feature_refresh: Global shelf refresh emitter to reduce per-shelf polling and improve performance
about_feature_saved_filters: Save and reuse filter combos across shelves
about_feature_screenshot_automation: Screenshot automation uses i18n language switching and CDP reachability checks
about_feature_shelves: Add unlimited custom shelves to the Home screen
about_feature_smart_shelves: Smart shelves: 12 heuristic templates that appear and disappear automatically based on your library
about_feature_sort: Sort games alphabetically or by last session
about_feature_sources: Populate shelves from collections, library sections, or advanced filters
about_feature_suspend_resume: SteamOS suspend/resume hooks pause timers and revalidate state on resume
about_feature_templates: Shelf templates (Favourites, Recently Played, Installed, Most Played)
about_feature_unifideck: UnifiDeck integration: surface non-Steam apps as shelf sources
about_feature_visibility: Show or hide individual shelves without deleting them
about_howto_step1: Open the Quick Access Menu (... button) and find Deck Shelves in the plugin list.
about_howto_step2: Toggle the main switch to enable shelves on the Home screen.
about_howto_step3: Tap the + button to create a new shelf. Choose a name, source (collection, library section, or filter), and set a game limit.
about_howto_step4: Use the ⋯ button on each shelf to edit, duplicate, reorder, show/hide, or delete it.
about_howto_step5: Use import/export to back up or share your shelf configurations.
about_learn_more_description: Visit the project on GitHub or report an issue / request a feature.
about_limitation_deck_only: This plugin is designed for Steam Deck in Gaming Mode only.
about_limitation_decky: Requires Decky Loader to be installed.
about_limitation_home: Shelves are injected into the Home screen and may be affected by Steam client updates.
about_report_issue: Report an issue / request a feature
about_support_description: If you enjoy this plugin, consider supporting continued development:
about_kofi_qr_hint: Scan the QR with your phone, or click Ko-fi to open the page in a browser.
about_feature_settings_page: Dedicated Settings page with a two-pane shell — left pane mirrors every QAM toggle; right pane opens 7 detail cards (Quick settings, Shelves, Profiles, Integrations, Shortcuts, Backup, Advanced tools).
about_feature_profiles: Usage profiles — save your entire setup (every toggle, shelf, and filter) as a named profile, switch between them in one tap, import / export to JSON, and keep a read-only "Default" entry that resets to factory.
about_feature_button_bindings: Customizable button shortcuts — remap or disable the gamepad triggers for hide / highlight / quick-launch on cards; remap (but not disable) the chords for Quick Search and Side Navigation. Single, chord (e.g. L1+R1), and double-tap (e.g. L1+L1) all supported.
about_feature_unified_list: Unified shelf list — opt in to merge regular and smart shelves into a single ordered list. Drag-and-drop or ↑ / ↓ buttons reorder; the home reflects your custom order.
about_feature_drag_reorder: HTML5 drag-and-drop reordering in the Shelves detail panel (unified mode), with a ⋮⋮ handle and visual feedback during the drag. Gamepad-friendly ↑ / ↓ buttons stay as a fallback.
about_feature_light_mode: Light mode — hides advanced toggles and sliders in the QAM / sidecar (CSS Loader force, smart-shelves-at-bottom, surprise-me, four global visual sliders) to keep the panel uncluttered for users who never touch them.
about_feature_external_launchers: External launcher discovery — EmuDeck, RetroDECK, Heroic (Epic / GOG / Amazon), Lutris, Moonlight, and Chiaki games surface through dedicated shelf sources. Read-only, runs in the background, refreshes every 15 minutes.
about_feature_integrations_toggle: Integrations panel — every registered descriptor (built-in or third-party) gets a per-row enable / disable toggle. Flip off the ones you don't need.
about_feature_built_in_chip: BUILT-IN chip — first-party Deck Shelves entries get a green tag in the Integrations card so you can tell them apart from third-party plugin contributions.
about_feature_filter_v3: 32 new built-in filters — genres, categories, franchise, VR support, multiplayer type, family sharing, DLC owned, soundtrack owned, launch count, average session length, never completed, recently abandoned, installed but never played, played only once, achievement percentage range, storage device, installed size, compat data quality, six external-launcher heuristics, executable type, launch option tags, custom tags, parser categories, hidden launcher shortcuts, and three composite modes (weighted, priority, exclusion group).
about_feature_sort_v3: 25 new built-in sorts — most / least launched, longest / shortest session, most ignored, rediscovered recently, completion %, closest to completion, rarest achievements, newest / oldest installed, oldest unplayed, newest purchased, largest / smallest install, SSD / SD priority, friends playing now, most friends owning, trending among friends, and five randomisation variants.
about_feature_source_v3: 19 new built-in shelf sources — dynamic Steam collections, followed, ignored, DLC, soundtrack, pinned, history, session queue, temporary queue, recently updated (last 14 days), with events, with workshop updates, controller-specific, and six external-launcher collections.
about_feature_grip_buttons: Map back-grip / stick-click buttons (L3, R3, L4, L5, R4, R5) to card shortcuts via the raw controller stream
about_feature_composite_shelves: Stack multiple sources into one composite shelf with Union (any) or Intersection (in all) modes
about_feature_asset_refresh: Custom artwork (capsule, logo, hero, icon) refreshes the moment you return to home — no plugin reload
